changes: Optimized node connectivity with handle-based interactions (Dots!).
Integrated Markdown support with real-time preview (remark-gfm).
Added manual resizing and toggle-able expanded views for notes.
Global scrollbars hidden for a cleaner immersive experience.
Implemented GitHub Hosting workflow and full documentation.
Fixed connection logic for smoother visual linking.
Initial launch of The Great Notes.
Neural drafting canvas with zoom/pan capabilities.
